title: Multicultural Education - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Multicultural Education 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON SOAR PORTLAND SPONSORS ORGANIZED TO ASSIST REFUGEES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive and direct resettlement services, case management, and advocacy to help refugees build new lives. Also provides global and cultural education to help raise awareness in the community about refugees and the lives they were forced to leave behind. Volunteers needed for English language tutoring, transportation, and office assistance. 7931 NE Halsey Street Suite 302 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Individuals who are refugees Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 284-3002 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY LIBRARY MY DISCOVERY PASS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers educational and cultural experiences. Library cardholders are able to use the pass to download tickets to participating museums, performances, and other attractions. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (503) 988-5123 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON SPONSORS ORGANIZED TO ASSIST REFUGEES
